_comment: VS Framework — Recommended MCP servers. Copy relevant sections to .claude/settings.json or .claude/settings.local.json. All are optional — only enable what you need.

context7._description: Fetch up-to-date documentation for libraries and frameworks. Actively used by: James (implementation), Alex (test framework APIs), vs-db-design (migration syntax), vs-api-integration (SDK methods). Also useful for: Marcus (tech decisions), Nina (docs).

github._description: Browse repos, issues, PRs, code search. Useful for: ALL agents. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN env var.

azure-devops._description: Browse Azure DevOps repos, work items, pipelines, PRs. Useful for: John (project tracking), Elena (plan sync), James (PRs), Priya (code review). Requires AZURE_DEVOPS_TOKEN and AZURE_DEVOPS_ORG env vars.

sqlite._description: Query and inspect SQLite databases directly. Useful for: James (dev), Alex (test data), vs-db-design (schema inspection).

mssql._description: Query and inspect SQL Server databases. Useful for: James (dev), Alex (test data), vs-db-design (schema inspection), vs-perf (query analysis). Requires connection string.

filesystem._description: Broader filesystem access beyond the working directory. Useful if agents need to read config from other locations.

fetch._description: Fetch web content and APIs. Useful for: Sofia (research), Ravi (CVE lookups), Luna (design references).

playwright._description: Browser automation for end-to-end testing and UX verification. Useful for: Alex (E2E tests, test execution), Luna (visual UX review, accessibility checks in real browser). Launches a real browser — no additional setup needed beyond having a browser installed.
